properties.displayName: Audit Storage Account Resilience for Geo-redundancy and Zone-Redundancy
nonComplianceMessages: Geo-redundancy and Zone-Redundancy must be enabled on Storage accounts for Vital and Critical Apps to meet the  requirements for SCCF Control: Audit Storage Account Resilience for Geo-redundancy and Zone-Redundancy. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
